content: Routing hardening follow-up after v0.1.1: reduced unnecessary doglegs by treating same X/Y as valid unless it creates exact endpoint overlap, insufficient spacing, component intersection, or long segment overlap. Endpoint deconfliction is scoped by node side, direct/low-bend routes are preferred before axis-conflict avoidance, and final straightening now also handles mixed-side endpoint-preserving L routes. The ArchMap core architecture fixture covers the previously observed Layout->Renderer dogleg and keeps it to three points. Verification: npm test -- --run test/layout.test.ts, npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build. Existing untracked reports/ left untouched.
